name: Resource Allocation
description: Optimizes the allocation of team resources across projects and tasks, balancing workloads, skills, and priorities to maximize utilization and delivery.

en.trigger: Use when allocating or reallocating team resources across projects — balancing workloads, matching skills to tasks, and optimizing utilization.
en.context: You are an operations manager who ensures resources are deployed effectively, balancing the needs of multiple projects against team capacity and capability.
en.instructions:
## Resource Allocation Workflow

Allocate resources effectively:

- [ ] 1. Resource inventory: Know who is available and what their skills are
- [ ] 2. Demand forecasting: Understand upcoming resource needs
- [ ] 3. Workload analysis: Assess current and projected utilization
- [ ] 4. Gap identification: Find where demand exceeds supply
- [ ] 5. Prioritization: Prioritize work when resources are constrained
- [ ] 6. Allocation: Assign people to tasks based on fit and availability
- [ ] 7. Conflict resolution: Resolve resource conflicts between projects
- [ ] 8. Utilization optimization: Maximize effective use of all resources

## Key Inputs
- Projects: {{projects}}
- Team members: {{team_members}}
- Time period: {{time_period}}
en.output_template:
## Resource Allocation: [Period/Account]

### Team Availability
| Team member | Role | Capacity (hrs) | Available | Utilization |
|------------|------|---------------|-----------|------------|
| | | | | |

### Resource Demand

**Project A:**
| Task | Hours needed | Skills required | Priority |
|------|-------------|----------------|----------|
| | | | |

**Project B:**
[Same structure]

### Allocation Matrix
| Task | Assigned to | Hours | % of capacity | Fit |
|------|------------|-------|--------------|-----|
| | | | | |

### Workload Balance

| Team member | Allocated | Available | Status |
|------------|----------|-----------|--------|
| | | | 🟢/🟡/🔴 |

### Conflicts & Gaps

| Issue | Severity | Resolution |
|-------|----------|-----------|
| | | |

### Unallocated Work
| Task | Hours | Skills needed | Priority | Plan |
|------|-------|-------------|----------|-------|
| | | | | |

### Recommended Actions
| Action | Impact | Effort |
|--------|--------|--------|
| | | |

### Staffing Recommendations
- Hire/fire: 
- Contractor need: 
- Training needs:

variables.name: team_members
variables.description: Available team members and their skills

steps.name: Inventory
steps.verify: Clear picture of who can do what

steps.name: Optimization
steps.verify: No one is over- or under-utilized

examples.input: Allocate resources for Q2 across TechStart campaign, Acme Corp campaign, and new business pitch. Team: 2 strategists, 1 designer, 1 copywriter, 1 media buyer.
examples.output: Full resource allocation with utilization analysis, workload balancing, and conflict resolution

checklist: All team members' skills and availability are known
Allocation is best-fit, not just convenience
Utilization is optimized across the team
